list.name: engine_exchange
list.label: Exchange
list.query: SELECT '__all' AS __text, '__all' AS __value UNION SELECT exchange AS __text, exchange AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT exchange FROM alpha_signal_panel_1d UNION SELECT DISTINCT exchange FROM execution_context_1m UNION SELECT DISTINCT exchange FROM strategy_universe_profiles) exchanges ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT '__all' AS __text, '__all' AS __value UNION SELECT exchange AS __text, exchange AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT exchange FROM alpha_signal_panel_1d UNION SELECT DISTINCT exchange FROM execution_context_1m UNION SELECT DISTINCT exchange FROM strategy_universe_profiles) exchanges ORDER BY 1

list.name: engine_strategy
list.label: Strategy
list.query: SELECT strategy_name AS __text, strategy_name AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_universe_profiles UNION SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles UNION SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_backtest_runs) strategies ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT strategy_name AS __text, strategy_name AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_universe_profiles UNION SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles UNION SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_backtest_runs) strategies ORDER BY 1

list.name: engine_stage
list.label: Stage
list.query: SELECT '__all' AS __text, '__all' AS __value UNION SELECT stage AS __text, stage AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT stage FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}') stages ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT '__all' AS __text, '__all' AS __value UNION SELECT stage AS __text, stage AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT stage FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}') stages ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS value FROM alpha_signal_panel_1d WHERE time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}')
SELECT COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(time))), 0) AS value FROM alpha_signal_panel_1d WHERE ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}')

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(orderbook_observed_ratio) * 100, 0), 2) AS value FROM alpha_signal_panel_1d WHERE time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}')

WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(run_at) AS run_at FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}') AND $__timeFilter(run_at)) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(selected_symbols), 0) AS value FROM strategy_universe_profiles u JOIN latest l ON u.run_at = l.run_at WHERE strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR u.exchange = '${engine_exchange}')

SELECT time_bucket('1 day', time) AS "time", COUNT(*) AS "Daily Signal Rows" FROM alpha_signal_panel_1d WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 day', time) AS "time", COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS "Symbols With Signals" FROM alpha_signal_panel_1d WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 day', time) AS "time", AVG(orderbook_observed_ratio) * 100 AS "Orderbook Conditioning %" FROM alpha_signal_panel_1d WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', run_at) AS "time", MAX(candidate_symbols) AS "Candidate Scan" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', run_at) AS "time", MAX(selected_symbols) AS "Selected Universe" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', run_at) AS "time", AVG(selected_avg_tradable_ratio) * 100 AS "Selected Tradable %" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(run_at) AS run_at FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}') AND $__timeFilter(run_at)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'deep' AS bucket, COALESCE(SUM(deep_liquidity_symbols), 0) AS value FROM strategy_universe_profiles u JOIN latest l ON u.run_at = l.run_at WHERE strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR u.exchange = '${engine_exchange}') UNION ALL SELECT 'core' AS bucket, COALESCE(SUM(core_liquidity_symbols), 0) AS value FROM strategy_universe_profiles u JOIN latest l ON u.run_at = l.run_at WHERE strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR u.exchange = '${engine_exchange}') UNION ALL SELECT 'tradable' AS bucket, COALESCE(SUM(tradable_liquidity_symbols), 0) AS value FROM strategy_universe_profiles u JOIN latest l ON u.run_at = l.run_at WHERE strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR u.exchange = '${engine_exchange}') UNION ALL SELECT 'fragile' AS bucket, COALESCE(SUM(fragile_liquidity_symbols), 0) AS value FROM strategy_universe_profiles u JOIN latest l ON u.run_at = l.run_at WHERE strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR u.exchange = '${engine_exchange}')) buckets ORDER BY bucket

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', run_at) AS "time", SUM(accepted_entries) AS "Accepted Entries" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', run_at) AS "time", SUM(rejected_gross_limit + rejected_long_limit + rejected_short_limit + rejected_net_limit + rejected_beta_limit + rejected_open_symbol) AS "Constraint Rejects" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(run_at) AS run_at FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}') AND $__timeFilter(run_at)) SELECT exchange, candidate_symbols, selected_symbols, ROUND(selected_avg_tradable_ratio * 100, 2) AS selected_tradable_pct, ROUND(selected_avg_spread_bps::numeric, 2) AS selected_spread_bps, ROUND(selected_avg_depth_usd::numeric, 2) AS selected_depth_usd, metadata -> 'top_candidates' AS top_candidates, metadata -> 'selected_universe' AS selected_universe FROM strategy_universe_profiles u JOIN latest l ON u.run_at = l.run_at WHERE strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR u.exchange = '${engine_exchange}') ORDER BY exchange

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(avg_capacity_utilization) * 100 AS "Avg Slot Usage %" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", MAX((max_concurrent_positions::double precision / NULLIF(policy_max_concurrent_positions, 0)) * 100) AS "Peak Slot Usage %" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", MAX((max_abs_net_exposure_fraction / NULLIF(policy_max_net_exposure_fraction, 0)) * 100) AS "Peak Net Budget %" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", MAX((max_abs_beta_btc / NULLIF(policy_max_abs_beta_btc, 0)) * 100) AS "BTC Beta Budget %" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", MAX((max_abs_beta_eth / NULLIF(policy_max_abs_beta_eth, 0)) * 100) AS "ETH Beta Budget %" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(candidate_entries) AS "Candidates" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(accepted_entries) AS "Accepted" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(rejected_gross_limit) AS "Rejected Gross" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(rejected_net_limit) AS "Rejected Net" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(rejected_beta_limit) AS "Rejected Beta" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(rejected_open_symbol) AS "Rejected Open Symbol" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${engine_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT run_at, strategy_name, timeframe, symbol, trades, ROUND((win_rate * 100)::numeric, 2) AS win_rate_pct, ROUND(net_return_pct::numeric, 2) AS net_return_pct, ROUND(avg_edge_after_cost_bps::numeric, 2) AS edge_after_cost_bps, ROUND(avg_total_cost_bps::numeric, 2) AS total_cost_bps, ROUND((avg_fill_ratio * 100)::numeric, 2) AS fill_ratio_pct, ROUND(max_drawdown_pct::numeric, 2) AS max_drawdown_pct, ROUND(sharpe::numeric, 3) AS sharpe FROM strategy_backtest_runs WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${engine_strategy}' AND ('${engine_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${engine_exchange}') ORDER BY run_at DESC, net_return_pct DESC LIMIT 100
